path:
for u in "sitemap.xml" "store-locator" "shop" "boutique" "store" "product-page" "shop-1" "our-store" "collections"; do
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://www.chateaudelesigny.com/$u" -A "Mozilla/5.0")
  echo "$code  /$u"
done

cd /workspaces/chateaudelesigny
for u in "/" "/chateaudelesigny/" "/chateaudelesigny/fr/" "/chateaudelesigny/fr/mariages/"; do
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:4321$u" --max-time 20)
  echo "$code  $u"
done

cd /workspaces/chateaudelesigny
echo "=== deploy status ==="; gh run list --workflow=deploy.yml --limit 2 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
echo "=== deployed github.io — FR vs EN histoire ==="
for loc in fr en; do
  n=$(curl -s --max-time 25 "https://mcorbett51090.github.io/chateaudelesigny/$loc/histoire/" 2>/dev/null | grep -oc 'ba-link__room')
  echo "  deployed $loc cards: $n"
done

cd /tmp/dryrun_workdir && sed -i "s|/workspaces/chateaudelesigny/scripts/analytics-digest.mjs|/tmp/dryrun_workdir/scripts/analytics-digest.mjs|" /tmp/claude-1000/-workspaces-chateaudelesigny/1997221a-68e3-4d69-b0fa-f7a294754efd/scratchpad/dry-run.mjs
rm -rf reports && mkdir -p reports/analytics reports/digests
node /tmp/claude-1000/-workspaces-chateaudelesigny/1997221a-68e3-4d69-b0fa-f7a294754efd/scratchpad/dry-run.mjs
echo "=== snapshot ==="
cat reports/analytics/2026-06.json
echo "=== digest ==="
cat reports/digests/2026-06.md

rm -rf /tmp/dryrun_workdir
git -C /workspaces/chateaudelesigny status --porcelain
echo "--- verify reports/ only has sample.json ---"
find /workspaces/chateaudelesigny/reports -type f
echo "--- node syntax check ---"
node --check /workspaces/chateaudelesigny/scripts/analytics-digest.mjs && echo "syntax OK"
echo "--- any lint/format scripts in package.json? ---"
cat /workspaces/chateaudelesigny/package.json | grep -i "lint\|format\|prettier\|eslint"
